subcodes.first_line: O thou who art illumined by the rays of the Sun of Truth! According to what hath been heard, nay rather, from what hath been widely circulated, nay, I beg God's forgiveness, from what is plainly evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستضای از انوار شمس حقیقت از قرار مسموع بل از آثار مبثوت بل استغفرالله مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @light and darkness
